items.name: RotatingStars-JS-CSS
items.title: RotatingStars
items.description: A free React WebGL background component featuring rotating star rings, customizable colors, speed, thickness, blur, opacity, and smooth shader-powered animations. Perfect for modern websites, landing pages, dashboards, and hero sections. No license required.
